title: Work-unit
description: Formal schema for a work-unit per D20 (work-unit kind). Work-units are tracked instances of organized work in workspace state (D7 §3). Kind-discriminated; lifecycle status enum is fixed at framework-core. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (kind resolves to a registered work-unit-kind; payload conforms to that kind's extension-declared payload schema; contributing-actors / contributing-specialists resolve in workspace state) is out of scope per D28.

id.description: Unique within the workspace (D20). Instance-identifier per D34 (admits dots; e.g., 'wu-b-plan-3.2-hennigsdorf-2024').

kind.description: Work-unit-kind identifier (D20). Open vocabulary per D29; values are extension-registered (fully-qualified).

status.description: Lifecycle phase. Fixed core enum (D20); extensions cannot add lifecycle states.

payload.description: Kind-specific content (D20). Framework doesn't validate payload shape at core; the work-unit-kind extension declaration provides a payload schema (per D29 vocabulary registration spec-ref) validated separately by the framework conformance validator (D30).

contributing-actors.description: Actors operating on this work-unit, with role-tags per D9 + D13. Required slot; may be [] (sensible at status='created').

contributing-specialists.description: Specialists operating on this work-unit, referenced by workspace.composition.specialist-bindings[].binding-id (per D34 §1.2 clarification of D30 §4). Required slot; may be [].

lifecycle.description: Timestamp markers (D20). Richer lifecycle history derivable from events filtered by this work-unit's id (D23).
